mapper.sql: fr.id, fr.name, fr.remark, fr.data_scope, fr.level, fr.permission, fr.create_time, fr.create_by, fr.update_time, fr.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.remark as ${tAlias}_remark, ${tAlias}.data_scope as ${tAlias}_data_scope, ${tAlias}.level as ${tAlias}_level, ${tAlias}.permission as ${tAlias}_permission, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_role (name, remark, data_scope, level, permission, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{permission,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_role set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_scope = #{dataScope,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, permission = #{permission,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from fnd_role fr left outer join fnd_users_roles fur on fr.id = fur.role_id left outer join fnd_user fu on fur.user_id = fu.id where fu.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by fr.id
